A program running in the embedded terminal may request Bluetooth access.
A program running in the embedded terminal may request calendar access.
A program running in the embedded terminal may request camera access.
A program running in the embedded terminal may request contacts access.
A program running in the embedded terminal may request local network access.
A program running in the embedded terminal may request location access.
A program running in the embedded terminal may request microphone access.
A program running in the embedded terminal may request photo library access.
A program running in the embedded terminal may request reminders access.
A program running in the embedded terminal may request speech recognition access.
A program running in the embedded terminal may request elevated privileges.
